title: sedum patens
intro: Sedum patens is a type of flowering succulent plant that belongs to the family Crassulaceae, commonly known as live forever plants due to their ability to survive for long periods without water. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of sedum patens include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system, among others. Sedum patens can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to soothe skin irritations, reduce pain, and promote overall well-being.
